name: TreePro Professional Tree Care
seoDescription: TreePro Professional Tree Care of Sebastopol — owner Ron Wallace and his crew have provided certified-arborist-directed tree pruning, removal and stump

sections.heading: Certified-arborist tree care in Sebastopol since 1990
sections.subheading: TreePro Professional Tree Care is Ron Wallace's Sebastopol tree company — every job is completed under the direction of a Certified Arborist, from routine pruning to hazardous removals and stump
badges: Work directed by a Certified Arborist

sections.heading: About TreePro Professional Tree Care
body: TreePro Professional Tree Care has been the professional choice for tree care in and around Sebastopol since 1990. Owner Ron Wallace, a Certified Arborist, and his crew serve homeowners and property managers throughout Sonoma County.

Every TreePro job is completed under the direction of a Certified Arborist, so trees are pruned, shaped or removed the right way. Services range from tree pruning and hazardous tree removal to stump grinding, tree consulting and 24/7 emergency response, and TreePro even grows replacement trees in its own nursery. The company is rated 4.8 on Angi across years of customer reviews.
highlights: Work directed by a Certified Arborist

items.title: Tree Pruning & Shaping
items.description: Arborist-directed pruning and shaping to keep trees healthy, safe and well-formed.

items.title: Tree Removal
items.description: Safe removal of hazardous, dead or unwanted trees by an experienced crew.

items.title: Stump Grinding
items.description: Grinding down leftover stumps so you can reclaim the space in your yard.

items.title: Consulting & Emergency Service
items.description: Tree consulting plus 24/7 emergency response when storms or hazards strike.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message TreePro Professional Tree Care and tell us what you need.

items.title: We assess
items.body: We look at the details and talk through the right approach with you.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.
